$comment: Layer C for BONUS vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. The CALC section flattens onto the THRU machinery (PERFORM CALC = CALC THRU STEP-TOTAL) and inlines fully, so Layer C enumerates the uplift and no-uplift paths, verifies the 50000.00 sales boundary, the base's half-cent congruence, and the uplift's nested rounding (round of 1.5x the settled base) via the exact machinery.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 BONUS (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-bonus)
